articles.title: This tiny claw in a 500-million-year-old fossil just rewrote the origin of spiders
articles.description: What started as routine fossil cleaning turned into a major scientific surprise when researchers uncovered a tiny claw in a 500-million-year-old specimen where no claw should exist. That detail revealed Megachelicerax cousteaui, the oldest known relative of spiders, pushing the origins of this group
